title: Implement remaining v2.3 operator and audit surfaces
description: Add contract-register, dependency-graph, decision-register, and a unified organization-audit command so v2.3 exposes the full operator-facing organization surface defined in docs/v2.3-operator-surface-definition.md.
triage_notes: Completed in v2.3 operator surface consolidation: contract-register, dependency-graph, decision-register, and organization-audit are implemented and covered by runtime tests.
